page_metadata.biotools__summary: A program for carrying out simulations of Protein Crystallographic diffraction images and analysing the unique data coverage for one or more crystal settings and series of diffraction images. It is itended primarly as a teaching tool.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A program for carrying out simulations of Protein Crystallographic diffraction images and analysing the unique data coverage for one or more crystal settings and series of diffraction images. It is itended primarly as a teaching tool.
